title: Creating a status or dropdown column with custom labels
excerpt:
Did you know that you can also use the create_column mutation to add a status or dropdown column with custom labels to a board? 
This method requires you to send the label values as JSON strings using the defaults argume…

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Did you know that you can also use the create_column mutation to add a status or dropdown column with custom labels to a board?

This method requires you to send the label values as JSON strings using the defaults argument, so ensure that your JSON is formatted properly to avoid errors. Check out our documentation to see a few examples!

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: Great. Is updating dropdown column values for existing column coming soon?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Nir-Jetpack,

I am not sure about that one but we will check and let you know!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Nir-Jetpack,

I checked this with our team and it is not planned for the near future to add the ability to update dropdown column values for existing columns.

The request exists but it will not be done soon.

Cheers,
Matias
